suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider documenting that exposing IPC handlers for validation check functions (like blok:getTransactionRefs) is a recommended pattern when renderer needs to display informative error messages before attempting operations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-blok-delete-check added blok:getTransactionRefs IPC handler alongside internal checkBlokInTransactions function to allow renderer to query reference counts before attempting deletion.
